channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Physical and Emotional Symptoms of Depression

item.title: Best Protein Sources for a Healthy, Balanced Diet
item.description: Looking to add more protein to your meals? Explore high-protein foods, including affordable options, to help meet your daily needs.

item.description: Older adults may be more vulnerable to asthma, study suggests. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Shingles Vaccine Coverage Falls Short
item.description: Fewer than half of eligible adults have had the NHS shingles jab, with health leaders urging millions to book their vaccine. Press Association
